bead.title: Persist fast numeric columns and bound sparse range scans

separate_rejected_lane.name: snapshot-cache string Range and Glob expansion

architecture.column_predicate: FieldKind::I64 or FieldKind::U64 with indexed || fast

range_lowering.old: scan every global docid in the leaf span and decode STOREDMETA
range_lowering.new: binary-search the typed NUMERIC pair run, iterate only bounded entries, filter snapshot-live docids, sort and deduplicate survivors
range_lowering.new_complexity: O(log N + M + M log M), where M is the bounded pair count
range_lowering.cancellation: checked before the scan, every 1024 bounded entries, and after the scan

snapshot_semantics.sealed: filters manifest tombstones before scorer construction
snapshot_semantics.delta: encodes only live rows and rechecks live visibility while materializing
snapshot_semantics.planning_cardinality: retains the physical numeric value count and leaf document domain

format_contract.readback: pinned fixture, section table, payloads, hashes, owned reader, and borrowed reader all verify

default_fast_only_ord_range_executes_and: pre-cancelled Cx returns phase numeric range
range_set_and_glob_lowering_is_identical: ordered document ids and f32 score bits identical
delta_seal_sidecars: tombstoned rows excluded from the sealed image
Delta seal bytes equal direct Scribe flush bytes
behavioral_proof.keeper_fixture: production-shaped test segments now carry a canonical sparse ord NUMERIC section

workspace_cargo_fmt.detail: A non-mutating local cargo fmt --check diagnostic was accidentally invoked and exited nonzero only on unrelated committed frankensearch-ops files. It made no changes and is inadmissible under the strict remote-only Cargo policy. Scoped direct nightly rustfmt is the formatting authority.

ubs.reason: UBS Rust scans launch hidden local Cargo subchecks, which are inadmissible under the campaign's strict remote-only Cargo policy.

remote_only.note: Every authoritative Cargo gate ran through RCH with RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1. The accidental local cargo fmt diagnostic was non-mutating, failed only on unrelated files, and is explicitly excluded.
